summary: Publish-time review fixes: snapKey avoids zero-ID snapshot collisions (since.go); RFC 5545 75-octet line folding (ical.go); deterministic wrapper-array selection (owed.go).
reason: Greptile review on the library PR flagged a zero-ID map-key collision, missing iCal line-folding, and non-deterministic map iteration in multi-array response parsing.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli/... passes incl. new fold/snapKey/determinism tests.
